operational_knowledge_units.title: Robotics module acts as the AGV state machine and command generator
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the Robotics module functions as the state machine for AGVs. It receives tote tasks from the Sorter Sweeper module and generates commands for Geek+ to execute those tasks.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'The Robotics module acts as the state machine for AGVs.'
Slide text: 'It receives tote tasks from the Sorter Sweeper module and generates commands for Geek+ to execute those tasks.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Module detailed design: the Robotics module acts as the state machine for AGVs. It receives tote tasks from the Sorter Sweeper module and generates commands for Geek+ to execute those tasks.

operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV command capabilities exposed by the Robotics module
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide lists AGV command types associated with the Robotics module: Induct tote, Remove tote, Initialize AGV, Empty go to, Pickup tote, Move tote, Drop off tote, Cancel Request, and Go Charge.
observed_evidence: Bulleted commands: 'Induct tote', 'Remove tote', 'Initialize AGV', 'Empty go to', 'Pickup tote', 'Move tote', 'Drop off tote', 'Cancel Request', 'Go Charge'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV commands listed on the Robotics Module detailed design slide: Induct tote, Remove tote, Initialize AGV, Empty go to, Pickup tote, Move tote, Drop off tote, Cancel Request, Go Charge. These are presented as Robotics module command capabilities for AGVs/Geek+ execution.
